messages.content: The operator opened this chat to answer the pending operator question on issue #21. Read issue #21, find its most recent "Blocked — operator needed" comment (marked `<!-- agencyx:settle:blocked-… -->`), and extract its question(s) and any options. Then you MUST pose the question to the operator by calling the `ask_user` tool with a small set of clickable options — never ask in prose, and do not just summarize the situation and stop. Only after the operator answers via `ask_user`, post that answer back to issue #21 as a comment that preserves the settle marker, so the agency resumes. Do not modify anything else on the issue.

messages.content:
Done. The four operator decisions are posted on [#21](https://github.com/iksnae/code-certification/issues/21) with the `<!-- agencyx:settle:blocked-591cf727f4da -->` marker intact — the agency will pick up from here. Here's the summary:

| # | Decision |
|---|---|
| 1 | Unanalyzed units: shown with all dimensions "Not Measured," grade N/A |
| 2 | Scope: all ~15 unanalyzed languages in one pass |
| 3 | Dead SwiftLint rule: removed now, re-added with the collector |
| 4 | Missing evidence: absent from score, surfaced as "Insufficient Data" in UI |
